On this page

Website Widget ​

The Website widget embeds a URL inside a dashboard frame. It works best for internal tools or pages that allow embedding.

Best size ​

Default palette size: 8 x 6.

Settings ​

FieldTypePurpose
urltextURL to embed.

YAML example ​

yaml
- id: internal-status
  type: website
  title: Status Page
  x: 0
  y: 10
  w: 8
  h: 6
  config:
    url: https://status.example.com
Pager
Previous pageFetch
Next pageDeepSeek
